about.title: We simplify digital business.
about.description: Our mission: enable every professional to manage, sell, and protect their activity efficiently.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content:
In the digital age, professionals face a multitude of scattered tools. Bööh was born from this frustration: why manage your digital card on one platform, your contacts on another, and your sales elsewhere?

We created Bööh to centralize all your professional activity in one place. One URL. Your entire business. Simple, secure, powerful.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: We believe business management should be simple, intuitive, and accessible to everyone.

security.title: Security
security.description: Protecting your data and content is our absolute priority. 256-bit encryption, GDPR compliance.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: We build fast, reliable, and scalable solutions to support your growth.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We integrate the latest AI technologies to automate and optimize your processes.

vision.title: Our vision: a more fluid and equitable digital economy.
vision.content:
We believe in a future where every professional, whether freelancer, creator, or company, has the tools they need to succeed online. No unnecessary complexity. No hidden fees. Just solutions that work.

Bööh constantly evolves to meet the needs of our community. Your feedback and needs shape our product every day.

cta.title: Join the Bööh Adventure
cta.description: Discover how we can transform your digital business.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about Bööh and our all-in-one AI business platform.

whatIsBooh.question: What is Bööh?
whatIsBooh.answer: Bööh is an all-in-one AI business platform that centralizes your professional activity in one URL. You can create your digital card, manage your contacts with AI CRM, sell your products through e-commerce, protect your files with DRM, manage your inventory, invoice, and much more. Your entire business in one place.

features.question: What are the main features of Bööh?
features.answer: Bööh includes: digital business card, CRM with artificial intelligence for contact management, integrated e-commerce, DRM system to protect your digital files, inventory management, automated invoicing, booking system, online payments, portfolio/showcase, and intelligent OCR to scan business cards. One platform to manage everything.

crm.question: How does Bööh's AI CRM work?
crm.answer: Bööh's AI CRM uses artificial intelligence to automate your contact management. It can scan business cards with OCR, suggest actions, analyze your customer interactions, and help you never lose a contact. The AI learns from your habits to optimize your workflow.

drm.question: How do I protect my files with DRM?
drm.answer: Bööh's DRM system allows you to protect your digital files (PDF, images, videos) against copying and unauthorized distribution. You can add dynamic watermarks, limit downloads, control access per user, and track who accesses your content. Ideal for creators and content sellers.

ecommerce.question: Can I sell my products online with Bööh?
ecommerce.answer: Yes! Bööh includes a complete e-commerce integrated into your digital card. You can create your product catalog, manage your inventory in real-time, configure payments (credit card, mobile money), and track your orders. Everything is centralized and accessible from your Bööh URL.

stock.question: How does inventory management work?
stock.answer: Bööh's inventory management is automatic and real-time. Each sale automatically updates your inventory, you receive alerts when quantities are low, and you can manage multiple warehouses if needed. The interface is simple and intuitive, even for beginners.

pricing.question: What are Bööh's pricing plans?
pricing.answer: Bööh offers several plans: a Free plan to get started with basic features, a Pro plan at 12,500 FCFA/month for professionals, and a Magic (Enterprise) plan at 25,000 FCFA/month with all advanced features and priority support. All plans include a free trial.

teams.question: Can I use Bööh for my team?
teams.answer: Absolutely! Bööh supports team collaboration with role and permission management. You can invite your collaborators, assign them specific roles (admin, seller, support, etc.), and work together on your projects. Perfect for SMEs and agencies.

security.question: Is my data secure?
security.answer: Yes, security is an absolute priority at Bööh. Your data is encrypted with 256-bit encryption, stored securely, and we are GDPR compliant. You have full control over your data and can export it at any time. We also guarantee 99.9% uptime.

mobile.question: Does Bööh work on mobile?
mobile.answer: Yes! Bööh is fully responsive and mobile-optimized. You can manage your business from your smartphone or tablet. There is also a mobile app for iOS and Android for an even smoother experience.

migration.question: Can I migrate my data from other platforms?
migration.answer: Yes, we offer import tools to facilitate migration from other platforms (CRM, e-commerce, etc.). Our support team can assist you in this process to ensure a smooth transition.

contact.question: How do I contact Bööh support?
contact.answer: You can contact us via our contact page (booh.ga/contact), by email at support@booh.ga, or via the integrated chat in your Bööh space. We generally respond within 24 hours. Priority support is available for Magic clients.

limits.question: Is there a limit to the number of contacts or products?
limits.answer: On the Free plan, some limits apply. Pro and Magic plans offer much higher limits, adapted to professional needs. Contact us to discuss custom limits if you have specific needs.

trial.question: How can I try Bööh for free?
trial.answer: It's simple! Create a free account at booh.ga/auth. No credit card required for the trial. You'll have access to all features during the trial period to discover how Bööh can transform your business.

noAnswer.title: Questions that don't find answers?
noAnswer.description: Our team is here to help you.

step1.title: Access Your Card Settings
step1.content: In your dashboard, click on "My Card" in the main menu. You will see your current card with all customization options.

step2.title: Edit Your Information
step2.content: Click on "Edit" and fill in all your fields: name, title, company, phone, email, address, social networks. The more you fill in, the more complete your card will be.

step3.title: Choose a Design
step3.content: Select a template from our pre-designed templates or fully customize your card with our design tools. You can change colors, fonts, images and layout.

step4.title: Add Elements
step4.content: Include your important links, products, social networks, certifications, or any other relevant element for your business.

step5.title: Generate and Share
step5.content: Once satisfied, click on "Publish". Your card will be online and you will receive your unique URL. Generate a QR code for printing or activate NFC if available.

Hello {{name}},

I hope you are doing well. I'm reaching out regarding our recent exchange.

Have you had a chance to review our proposal? Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

Best regards,

offre.subject: Special offer just for you

Hello {{name}},

I'm pleased to offer you an exclusive deal.

This special offer is only available to our privileged clients.

Are you interested?

Best regards,

facture.subject: Invoice reminder

Hello {{name}},

I'm reminding you that an invoice is pending payment.

Please proceed with payment as soon as possible.

Best regards,

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text1: The Bööh platform, published by SASU MiscochIT, attaches paramount importance to the protection of your personal data. This privacy policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and what your rights are.
intro.text2: By using our platform, you accept the practices described in this policy.

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.accountList: Name, surname, email, phone number (optional), profile picture (optional), professional information (company, position)
dataCollected.usageList: IP address, browser, device, pages visited and visit duration, interactions with your business card, anonymized statistics
dataCollected.paymentList: Billing information, transaction history (via secure third-party processors)

dataUsage.title: Data Usage
dataUsage.list2: Create and manage your digital business card
dataUsage.list3: Process payments and manage your subscription

rights.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.intro: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:
rights.access: Right of access: Obtain a copy of your data
rights.rectification: Right of rectification: Correct inaccurate data
rights.erasure: Right to erasure: Delete your data ("right to be forgotten")
rights.portability: Right to portability: Retrieve your data in a structured format
rights.objection: Right to object: Object to the processing of your data
rights.limitation: Right to limitation: Limit the processing of your data
rights.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at:

security.title: Security and Retention
security.securityText: Security: We use technical and organizational security measures to protect your data (SSL/TLS encryption, secure authentication, regular audits).
security.conservationText: Retention: Your data is kept as long as your account is active. After deletion, it is kept for 30 days for possible recovery, then permanently deleted.
security.sharingText: Sharing: We never sell your data. It can only be shared with:
security.providers: Our service providers (hosting, payment) under strict contract
security.authorities: Legal authorities if required by law

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text1: We use essential cookies for site operation and analytical cookies (with your consent) to improve our services.
cookies.text2: You can manage your cookie preferences in your browser settings.

modifications.title: Modifications
modifications.text: We may update this privacy policy. In case of significant change, we will inform you by email or via a notification on the platform.

contact.title: Questions?
contact.description: For any questions regarding this privacy policy or exercising your rights, contact us:

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text1: By accessing Bööh and using its services, you agree to be bound by these terms of use. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the platform.
acceptance.text2: These terms apply to all platform users: visitors, free users, and subscribers.

service.title: Service Description
service.intro: Bööh is a digital business card creation platform with features including:
service.feature1: Creation and customization of digital business cards
service.modificationText: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue all or part of the service at any time.

account.title: User Account
account.creation: Account creation: You must provide accurate and complete information when registering. You are responsible for the security of your password.
account.age: Minimum age: You must be at least 18 years old to use Bööh, or have parental/guardian authorization.
account.oneAccount: One account per person: You can only create one personal account.
account.suspension: Suspension: We reserve the right to suspend or delete your account in case of violation of the terms.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Use
prohibited.item1: Use the platform for illegal or unauthorized purposes
prohibited.item2: Post offensive, defamatory, pornographic, or violent content
prohibited.item4: Violate the intellectual property rights of others
prohibited.item5: Transmit viruses, malware, or malicious code
prohibited.item6: Collect data from other users without authorization
prohibited.item8: Create fake accounts or manipulate statistics
prohibited.item9: Use bots or automated scripts without authorization

pricing.title: Pricing and Payments
pricing.plans: Available plans: Bööh offers different subscription plans (Free, Business, Magic) with varying features.
pricing.billing: Billing: Paid subscriptions are billed monthly or annually, depending on your choice. Renewal is automatic.
pricing.refunds: Refunds: We offer a 14-day refund for new subscribers. After this period, no refund will be made for unused months.
pricing.cancellation: Cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your management area. Access to premium features remains active until the end of the paid period.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.yourContent: Your content: You retain ownership of any content you post on Bööh (texts, images, videos). By posting content, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, and free license to display and distribute it as part of the service.
intellectualProperty.ourContent: Our content: Bööh, its logo, design, and features are protected by copyright and trademarks. You cannot copy, modify, or distribute our content without authorization.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.text1: Bööh is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.
liability.text2: To the extent permitted by law, Bööh will not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service.

law.title: Applicable Law and Disputes
law.text1: These terms are governed by the laws of Gabon. Any dispute will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Libreville.
law.text2: In case of dispute, we encourage you to contact us first to find an amicable solution.

modifications.title: Modifications of Terms
modifications.text: We may modify these terms at any time. In case of significant change, we will inform you by email or via notification. Your continued use of the service after notification constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: Questions?
contact.description: For any questions regarding these terms of use, contact us:

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.description: Legal information and platform contact details

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.text1: All content on this site (structure, texts, logos, images, videos, databases, etc.) is the exclusive property of Bööh or its partners.
intellectualProperty.text2: Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, or adaptation of any part of the site elements, regardless of the means or process used, is prohibited without prior written authorization.
intellectualProperty.text3: The trademarks and logos present on the site are registered trademarks. Any unauthorized reproduction or use constitutes counterfeiting sanctioned by intellectual property law.

personalData.title: Personal Data
personalData.intro: The information collected on this site is subject to computer processing intended for:
personalData.gdprText: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your personal data.
personalData.moreInfo: For more information, see our Privacy Policy.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text1: This site uses cookies to improve user experience and analyze traffic.
cookies.text2: You can disable cookies at any time from your browser settings. However, some site features may be affected.

liability.title: Liability
liability.text1: Bööh strives to ensure the accuracy and updating of information disseminated on this site. However, we cannot guarantee the completeness, accuracy, or timeliness of the content.
liability.text2: Bööh disclaims all liability in case of site interruption, bug occurrence, or damage resulting from fraudulent intrusion by a third party that led to information modification.

hyperlinks.title: Hyperlinks
hyperlinks.text1: The site may contain links to external sites. Bööh exercises no control over these sites and disclaims all responsibility for their content.
hyperlinks.text2: Creating hyperlinks to the Bööh site requires prior written authorization.

applicableLaw.title: Applicable Law
applicableLaw.text1: These legal notices are governed by Gabonese law.
applicableLaw.text2: In case of dispute and in the absence of amicable agreement, the dispute will be brought before the competent courts of Libreville.
